summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India activity concentrates in Colo layer (269 signals) and Build layer (18 signals), with Power (9) and Compute (3) showing secondary presence. Top Indian states by entity presence: Tamil Nadu (Sify), Delhi (Nxtra, Oracle), Maharashtra (NTT, Reliance, Tata, Web Werks), Gujarat (AdaniConnex), Telangana (Yotta), Karnataka (Google). GCC movements with India relevance: UAE shows Colo (1) and Build (8) activity; Saudi Arabia shows Power (1) and Build (1) activity; no GCC entity shows direct India facility presence or hiring spikes in data.

POLICY READ
India regulation shows 3 items: Notices of Attachment of Bank Accounts and Demat Accounts (AP Nos. 15504-15509) dated June 2026 — indicating financial enforcement actions affecting market access. Saudi Arabia regulation shows 11 items (strongest tailwind), including cloud growth, AI innovation, Hajj data center shifts, and construction surge — pushing GCC players toward regional expansion but not directly driving India entry. No India-specific policy tailwinds (legislation/analysis) present; only regulatory enforcement notices.

COMMERCIAL READ
India Colo layer: 252 signals (Commercial layer×market), led by Sify (score 77.5, cin=U72200TN1995PLC050809), Nxtra (score 48.3, cin=U72200DL2013PLC254747), NTT (score 30.1, cin=U72200MH1994PTC083713). India Build layer: 1 signal (AdaniConnex not in top prospects; no Build-layer entities in TOP PROSPECTS). GCC active layers: UAE Compute (2), Saudi Power (1), Qatar Power (1), UAE Build (8), Saudi Build (4). No GCC operator shows India Colo or Build activity in commercial data.

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. center3; why-now: active in GCC (SA) with score 52.1, no India entity; cross-signal: whitespace target (GCC active, no India entity); TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: cin=, ev=0223d872de10, 79fd79d26e0a, c91f9bae49fe, b8ff3f8e9923, 6ea4c9dde3eb, 94c55c554538, 466ef9dd1e65, 8eaa1b1ce927
2. CtrlS; why-now: active in India (score 35.8) but unresolved CIN, India entity present; cross-signal: India actor in OSINT (18 job-postings/facility-presence), unresolved status suggests filing/structural change; TAG play: India government-affairs (to resolve CIN/status) + partnership; evidence: cin=, ev=8031780bae1e, 2d2e44f68cdd, 5c16e38b7910, 86c9cfef3386, 439f740d3a33, 3177f4f8489b, 39471e6ed1fb, a81184f81bc4
3. Khazna; why-now: active in GCC with score 29.1, no India entity; cross-signal: whitespace target (GCC active, no India entity); TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: cin=not in data, ev=not in data (Khazna not in TOP PROSPECTS or WHITESPACE list with ev — only name/score/layer/geo given)
4. Ooredoo; why-now: active in GCC with score 25.4, no India entity; cross-signal: whitespace target (GCC active, no India entity); TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: cin=not in data, ev=not in data (Ooredoo not in TOP PROSPECTS or WHITESPACE list with ev)
5. Sify; why-now: top momentum (score 9.29 in KEY SIGNALS), active India Colo leader; cross-signal: India entity (cin=U72200TN1995PLC050809), rising filings (SIFY TECHNOLOGIES LTD in FILINGS SS3), OSINT top actor (29); TAG play: India partnership (deepen existing presence) + government-affairs (monitor attachment notices); evidence: cin=U72200TN1995PLC050809, ev=341f0dc0b422, 0001554855-26-001437, 0001554855-26-000600, 0001575872-26-000022, 0001575872-25-000666, 0001575872-25-000646, 49dd2464fa3e, 594d534e0c59
